headline: Jim Cramer on Vistra (VST): “I’d Buy It”
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) was among Jim Cramer’s stock calls, as he discussed the rising market speculation. Cramer noted the company’s nuclear exposure and said: I love nuclear power, but even with a more favorable regulatory environment, it’s just not a great business. Building nuclear plants costs too much, and by the way, it takes way […]

headline: The Crowd Is Dumping Vistra. Here's Why I'd Be Buying the Stock Down 25%.
summary: The independent power producer will benefit from growing electricity demand from AI data centers in the coming years.
